Class MeterChartBuilder

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.builder.AbstractBuilder<MeterChartBuilder, DRChart>
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.builder.component.ComponentBuilder<MeterChartBuilder, DRChart>
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.builder.component.DimensionComponentBuilder<MeterChartBuilder, DRChart>

ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.builder.chart.MeterChartBuilder
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class MeterChartBuilder extends AbstractChartBuilder<MeterChartBuilder>
